mapper.select: SELECT CHAMP_NO AS champNo, CHAMP_NAME AS champName, CHAMP_POSITION AS champPosition, CHAMP_ROLES AS champRoles, CHAMP_IMG AS champImg, CHAMP_NAME AS id FROM CHAMP_INFO ORDER BY CHAMP_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAMP_SKILLS_INFO ( CHAMP_NO, SKILL_P_NAME, SKILL_P_DESC, SKILL_P_IMG, SKILL_Q_NAME, SKILL_Q_DESC, SKILL_Q_IMG, SKILL_W_NAME, SKILL_W_DESC, SKILL_W_IMG, SKILL_E_NAME, SKILL_E_DESC, SKILL_E_IMG, SKILL_R_NAME, SKILL_R_DESC, SKILL_R_IMG ) VALUES ( #{champNo}, #{skillPName}, #{skillPDesc}, #{skillPImg}, #{skillQName}, #{skillQDesc}, #{skillQImg}, #{skillWName}, #{skillWDesc}, #{skillWImg}, #{skillEName}, #{skillEDesc}, #{skillEImg}, #{skillRName}, #{skillRDesc}, #{skillRImg} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.CHAMP_NO, C.CHAMP_NAME, C.CHAMP_IMG, CASE WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%assassin%' THEN '암살자' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%fighter%' THEN '전사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%mage%' THEN '마법사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%marksman%' THEN '원거리 딜러' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%support%' THEN '서포터' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%tank%' THEN '탱커' ELSE C.CHAMP_POSITION END as CHAMP_POSITION, S.*, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NO, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NAME, K.CHAMP_SKIN_IMG FROM CHAMP_INFO C LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKILLS_INFO S ON C.CHAMP_NO = S.CHAMP_NO LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKIN_INFO K ON C.CHAMP_NO = K.CHAMP_NO WHERE C.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}
SELECT ITEM_NO AS itemNo, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM_PRICE AS itemPrice, ITEM_INFO AS itemInfo, ITEM_IMG AS itemImg, ITEM_TAG AS itemTag FROM LOL_ITEM_INFO ORDER BY ITEM_PRICE ASC, ITEM_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOL_ITEM_INFO ( ITEM_NO, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_PRICE, ITEM_INFO, ITEM_IMG, ITEM_TAG ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{itemName}, #{itemPrice}, #{itemInfo}, #{itemImg}, #{itemTag} )
